intent: Write a scoped comparison on 'smart lighting versus warm dumb bulbs' for a small-apartment evening routine. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the electronics and home-kitchen categories and collect at least 3 lighting products across both categories (smart bulb, lamp, nightlight). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/technology AND /f/LifeProTips for posts on whether smart bulbs deliver value or annoy. Collect at least 2 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) table each pick, (b) summarize the community debate, (c) commit to either smart or dumb for a $60 bedroom setup, (d) close with one 'ignore the hype' note. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Easy tier. Smart vs dumb bulb debate.
